app.title: Magen Crisis Monitor
app.subtitle: Real-time official alerts, guidance, and trusted news context for Israel.

app.latestAlertBody: No active emergency alerts yet. Official alert ingestion will appear here in Phase 2.

app.officialBody: Guidance updates from official sources will appear in this section.
app.watchlistBody: Watchlist support is scaffolded. Saved places will surface prioritized alerts.

mapPage.title: Crisis Map
mapPage.description: Official alerts and local watched locations are rendered on top of the mapcn base map.
mapPage.alertsEmptyBody: No map-ready alert coordinates yet. Alerts will appear here after ingestion provides location data.
mapPage.watchlistEmptyBody: No local watched locations yet. Add one from the watchlist flow to show it on the map.
mapPage.watchlistManagerDescription: Save locations from active official alerts and remove them anytime.
mapPage.watchlistSuggestedEmptyBody: No alert-based map locations are available to add right now.
mapPage.watchlistPriorityEmptyBody: No watched areas currently overlap active alerts.

notifications.deliveryStatusFallback: Realtime unavailable. Backup polling is active.
